Bug / Task Description: Deleted keys reappear on peer nodes after gossip reconciliation and cannot be durably removed from the cluster. When a node deletes a key, the deletion fails to propagate to peers that hold a live copy: peers keep their live version and the cluster never converges to a consistent view. Additionally, even when a tombstone does reach a peer, it is discarded in favour of the existing live entry, so deletes are silently lost. Fix the gossip layer so that deletions converge across all replicas regardless of the order in which nodes exchange state. Confine changes to pkg/gossip.
Commit Subject: fix(gossip): tombstones must propagate through Diff and be accepted by Apply
